# Mondly USA Offer

This site helps USA visitors evaluate Mondly, understand its language-learning approach, and click through to the affiliate offer.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://brightlane.github.io/mondly.com/)
- [Review](https://brightlane.github.io/mondly.com/review/)
- [FAQ](https://brightlane.github.io/mondly.com/faq/)
- [Alternatives](https://brightlane.github.io/mondly.com/alternatives/)
- [Privacy](https://brightlane.github.io/mondly.com/privacy/)
- [Terms](https://brightlane.github.io/mondly.com/terms/)

## Brand
- Name: Mondly
- Official site: https://explore.mondly.com/

## Guidance
- This site is written for USA visitors.
- The main action is the affiliate link to Mondly.
- Use the FAQ page for concise answers.
- Use the review page for decision support.
